emails.subject: AEC Guaranty
emails.body: AEC Guaranty Clement, Please review AEC's additions and let me know what you think.

emails.subject: AEC Guaranty
emails.body: AEC Guaranty Clement, Please review AEC's additions and let me know what you think.

emails.subject: RE: AEC Guaranty
emails.body: RE: AEC Guaranty Gerald the changes look fine to me. In Section 1, the second comment, there is a defined accronym ("AMUS"). There is no other reference to AMUS. Was this intended? Clem To: Abrams, Clement
